description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern design, upholstered in a dark, subtly patterned fabric. The lounge features multiple back cushions that are evenly spaced and appear plush, providing ample support along the entire backrest. The seat cushions are thick and continuous, with a chaise section extending from one end, ideal for reclining. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the overall height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The legs are short, metallic, and squared, giving the lounge a stable and contemporary appearance. The upholstery has a fine, geometric texture that adds visual interest without overwhelming the design.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional lounge with dark patterned upholstery, plush back cushions, and a chaise extension. Features broad padded armrests and short metallic legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the broad, padded armrest and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_1: Front angled view highlighting the L-shape, chaise section, and arrangement of back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full L-shaped layout, cushion arrangement, and chaise extension.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the continuous backrest and the uniformity of the back cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Seven loose back cushions evenly spaced along the backrest, two smaller side cushions, and continuous seat cushions including a chaise section; all cushions are plush and rectangular.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, high backrest with uniform height and segmented by individual back cushions; no visible tufting or curvature.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; straight, broad, padded armrests at both ends, matching backrest height.
attribute_leg_style: Short, squared metallic legs with a simple, modern design; legs are positioned at the corners and slightly inset.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle geometric pattern in dark fabric, with a matte finish and no visible tufting or quilting.
